metadata.description: Apogee — personal fork of the Claude Code Development Kit (CCDK). Per-project install of the workflow machinery (beads/br gates, git-flow & git-commit enforcement, idea-mcp guards, hard review->docs gate, security scan) plus the prime/plan/merge commands and the docs/apogee doc loop.

plugins.name: apogee
plugins.description: Claude Code workflow machinery: lifecycle hooks (br/git-flow/idea/review gates), workflow skills (update-docs, review-work, second-opinion, deploy, doc, readme, image-*, br, git-commit, git-flow, idea-mcp), and the init/prime/plan-feature/release/merge commands. Install once, enable per project.
